quotes.verbatim_quote: Apply the principle of alternating the descending and ascending forms of the chord scales to the chords in patterns No. 34, 35 and 36.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines a core methodological rule — alternating direction — that the student must independently apply across multiple patterns, making it a generative technique rather than a one-off instruction.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Note: To be used for C, CM6, CM7 or CM9.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Specifies which chord qualities each major digital pattern is applicable to, directly teaching harmonic context for deployment of the exercise.
A recurring standing rule reinforcing the method's foundational demand that every pattern be internalized across the entire chromatic spectrum.
